# Daily Scrum Output Template

## Sprint Goal Focus

- Restate the current sprint goal or immediate delivery focus.

## Progress Since Last Sync

- What moved forward.

## Plan Until Next Sync

- What should happen next.

## Impediments And Dependencies

- Active blockers.
- Dependency issues.
- Owner or escalation path when known.

## Risk To Sprint Goal

- State whether the sprint goal is on track, at risk, or blocked.

## Follow-Up Actions

- Immediate actions to unblock or re-coordinate work.
